Name: In Memoriam Repository
Description: Repository for the Jellyfin In Memoriam Plugin

Manifest.Name: In Memoriam
Manifest.Description: Automatically creates a collection of movies featuring recently deceased actors. Uses TheMovieDB metadata to identify actors who have passed away within a configurable timeframe.
Manifest.Author: peaceoliver
Manifest.Overview: The In Memoriam plugin automatically creates a collection of movies featuring recently deceased actors, pulling metadata from TheMovieDB. It runs on server startup and daily to keep the collection current.
Manifest.Changelog: Initial release - Automatic detection of recently deceased actors based on configurable lookback period
